meta.description: Investment-research runtime routing and storage policy

avoid_when: 纯脚本可稳定完成的机械步骤
subagent_policy.goal: Use GPT-5.4 everywhere for reasoning roles while keeping deterministic scripts as the execution backbone.

downgrade_protocol.note: If subagent team cannot be fully spawned, do not silently switch to single-agent execution.

subagent_reasoning_policy.note: sessions_spawn currently enforces thinking directly for subagents; maintain high-thinking as mandatory baseline.

translation: qwen-turbo (briefing scripts only; not part of IR main-agent routing)

agent_role_assignment.orchestrator: GPT-5.4 main session — route work, own task state, report to Xavier, decide gates
agent_role_assignment.builder_search: GPT-5.4 subagent — expand search angles, improve query packs, inspect evidence gaps
agent_role_assignment.industry_analyst: GPT-5.4 subagent — industry structure, market sizing, competitive map
agent_role_assignment.business_model_analyst: GPT-5.4 subagent — revenue engine, unit economics, GTM, product logic
agent_role_assignment.financial_valuation_analyst: GPT-5.4 subagent — forecast, valuation, target price logic, scenario table
agent_role_assignment.management_quality_analyst: GPT-5.4 subagent — management, governance, capital allocation, execution
agent_role_assignment.differentiation_analyst: GPT-5.4 subagent — moat, edge, product/tech differentiation
agent_role_assignment.risk_catalyst_analyst: GPT-5.4 subagent — key risks, catalysts, trigger table, invalidation
agent_role_assignment.reviewer: GPT-5.4 subagent — pass/fail review gates, stop low-evidence outputs
agent_role_assignment.writer: GPT-5.4 subagent — memo structure, polishing, delivery packaging
agent_role_assignment.ops_scripts: deterministic local scripts — fetch, packet fill, evidence table, bundle assembly

conflict_avoidance: Do not replace the deterministic IR script chain with free-form subagents.
Subagents only add reasoning/review layers around existing scripts and artifacts.
All artifacts stay in data/tasks/ and reports/; no parallel shadow directories.
Only the main orchestrator updates task state, communicates outward, and decides Done/Failed.
Morning briefing scripts remain script-first; subagents only enter on escalation/review, not as the default generation path.

thinking_policy.rule: All reasoning-bearing IR subagents run with thinking=high by default; deterministic fetch/transform steps remain scripts and do not consume agent thinking budget.
thinking_policy.note: For IR reasoning agents, the intended runtime behavior is equivalent to enabling reasoning and setting thinking to high.

storage.rule: Final user-facing reports go to reports/. Intermediate workflow artifacts, evidence, reviewer outputs, and bundles go to data/tasks/.

memory_boundary.note: OpenClaw native memory is not yet the primary store for this workflow.
